source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dataflow_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Refresh20WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '73_Refresh_WF_People') AS Dataflow_Name,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Pipeline_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Refresh20WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '73_Refresh_WF_People') AS Pipeline_Name,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Refresh20WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '73_Refresh_WF_People') AS Src_Container_Name,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Refresh20WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '73_Refresh_WF_People') AS Src_filename,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Refresh20WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '73_Refresh_WF_People') AS Src_path_Name,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Refresh20WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '73_Refresh_WF_People') AS Tgt_Container_Name,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Refresh20WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '73_Refresh_WF_People') AS Tgt_filename,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Refresh20WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '73_Refresh_WF_People') AS Tgt_path_Name,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Table_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Refresh20WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '73_Refresh_WF_People') AS Tgt_Table_Name,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Schema_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Refresh20WF_People' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '73_Refresh_WF_People') AS Tgt_Schema_Name;

activities.name: SP_Last_Refresh_Date_to_Variable
activities.description: Fetches MAX(update_date) from dbo.WF_People. DTSX: 'Last Refresh Date to Variable' Execute SQL Task.

scripts.text: SELECT FORMAT(MAX(update_date), 'yyyyMMdd') AS lastRefreshDateString FROM dbo.WF_People

activities.name: VA_Last_Refresh_Date_to_Variable
activities.description: Sets variable lastRefreshDateString from script output.

activities.name: SP_Truncate_WF_People_Staging
activities.description: Deletes all rows from dbo.WF_People_Staging. DTSX: 'Truncate WF_People_Staging' Execute SQL Task.

activities.name: DF_73_Refresh_WF_People
activities.description: Executes dataflow 73_Refresh_WF_People. DTSX source 'Get HR Core Common Updates': Oracle ADO.NET, AccessMode=2 (SQL command), DISTRIBUTION.VW_CORE_COMMON, 14 output columns mapped to dbo.WF_People_Staging. DTSX destination 'OLE DB Destination': [dbo].[WF_People_Staging], AccessMode=3. Source SQL passed as dataflow parameter 'srcQuery' with lastRefreshDateString injected.

activities.name: SP_Merge_WF_People
activities.description: MERGE dbo.WF_People from staging. DTSX: 'Merge WF_People' Execute SQL Task. Matches ON emplId; UPDATE 14 cols; INSERT new; DELETE not matched by source is commented out.

scripts.text:
MERGE dbo.WF_People AS trgt
USING dbo.WF_People_Staging AS src
ON src.emplId = trgt.emplId

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN UPDATE SET
		  trgt.[name] = src.[name]
		, trgt.[lastName] = src.[lastName]
		, trgt.[firstName] = src.[firstName]
		, trgt.[email] = src.[email]
		, trgt.[isTcoo] = src.[isTcoo]
		, trgt.[isPlatformAppServices] = src.[isPlatformAppServices]
		, trgt.[level3Org] = src.[level3Org]
		, trgt.[level3Mgr] = src.[level3Mgr]
		, trgt.[level3MgrEmplid] = src.[level3MgrEmplid]
		, trgt.[level4Org] = src.[level4Org]
		, trgt.[level4Mgr] = src.[level4Mgr]
		, trgt.[level4MgrEmplid] = src.[level4MgrEmplid]
		, trgt.[employeeStatus] = src.[employeeStatus]
		, trgt.[update_date] = getDate()
		, trgt.[updated_by] = 'AD-ENT\TCOO_1TCOO_SSISD'
		, trgt.[source_name] = 'DISTRIBUTION.VW_CORE_COMMON'

WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET
    THEN INSERT 
		([emplId], [name], [lastName], [firstName], [email], [isTcoo], [isPlatformAppServices]
		, [level3Org], [level3Mgr], [level3MgrEmplid], [level4Org], [level4Mgr], [level4MgrEmplid]
		, [employeeStatus], [create_date], [update_date], [created_by], [updated_by], [source_name])
		VALUES
		(src.[emplId], src.[name], src.[lastName], src.[firstName], src.[email], src.[isTcoo]
		, src.[isPlatformAppServices], src.[level3Org], src.[level3Mgr], src.[level3MgrEmplid]
		, src.[level4Org], src.[level4Mgr], src.[level4MgrEmplid], src.[employeeStatus]
		, getDate(), getDate(), 'AD-ENT\TCOO_1TCOO_SSISD', 'AD-ENT\TCOO_1TCOO_SSISD', 'DISTRIBUTION.VW_CORE_COMMON')

--	DO NOT DELETE IF NOT MATCHED SOURCE
--	It means the record was not updated in HR.
--WHEN NOT MATCHED BY SOURCE
--    THEN DELETE;
;
